error_signature: no output for invalid file paths
title: No output for invalid file paths in Read/Write Files node
symptom: When using dynamic expressions for file paths, the Read/Write Files from Disk node produces no output for invalid paths. This can lead to fewer output items than expected.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
root_cause: The Read/Write Files from Disk node does not output any data for invalid file paths. If the dynamic expression resolves to a path that does not exist, the node will not produce any output for that iteration.
fix_steps: Check the values being passed to the dynamic expression for file paths.
Ensure all paths are valid and exist on the disk.
If needed, enable the 'Always Output Data' option in the node settings.
agent_instruction: Verify the file paths in your dynamic expression and enable 'Always Output Data' if necessary.
